title: Google Analytics 4 Admin Access Set Up Guide

intro.text: We need admin access to your Google Analytics 4 property to create a new GA4 property for the new funnel on Webflow. This allows us to set up Google Ads conversion tracking so we can measure landing page performance accurately.
bullets: Track conversions specifically from the LPL funnel landing page
Report on landing page performance separately from your other website activity
intro.helpText: If you have any troubles, feel free to email Tyce, or book a meeting directly

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Sign in at analytics.google.com
steps.description: Ensure the correct property is selected.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: Under Account column, click "Account Access Management"

steps.label: Step 4
steps.title: Click the blue + button, then select "Add users"

steps.label: Step 5 (Final Step)
steps.title: Enter "dev@landingpagelabs.co", select the Administrator role, click "Add"
